ddls:
CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the network (e.g., 7th_graders, add_health_comm1) */,
  "network_domain" TEXT /* Domain of the network (e.g., Social,Offline) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of the network (e.g., community, communication) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the network */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the network (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Detailed documentation or metadata about the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the node belongs to */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., person, organization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the node (e.g., active, removed) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional information or metadata about the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the edge belongs to */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node */,
  "target_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target node */,
  "edge_type" TEXT /* Type of the edge (e.g., friendship, collaboration) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the edge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the edge */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the edge (e.g., active, removed) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional information or metadata about the edge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the metric belongs to */,
  "nodes" INTEGER /* Number of nodes in the network */,
  "edges" INTEGER /* Number of edges in the network */,
  "iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations in the network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the metric (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional information or metadata about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_metrics_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the iteration belongs to */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the iteration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the iteration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the iteration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the iteration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional information or metadata about the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the attribute */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the attribute (e.g., active, removed) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional information or metadata about the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_attributes_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edge_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edge the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the attribute */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the attribute (e.g., active, removed) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional information or metadata about the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edge_attributes_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES edges ("edge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional information or metadata about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
